catalog_content:
Item Name: Iberia Yuca/Cassava Chips, 8.8 oz
Bullet Point 1: NUTRITIOUS CASSAVA CHIPS: Discover the wholesome Iberia Cassava Chips, an exciting snack choice that not only tantalizes your taste buds but also supports your well-being.
Bullet Point 2: CRISP & HEALTHY: Enjoy the delightful crunch of these chips while knowing that you're making a nutritious choice. Unlike many traditional potato chips, cassava chips provide a satisfyingly crisp texture without the guilt. They are low in fat and a healthier alternative to many other snack options.
Bullet Point 3: ALL-NATURAL GOODNESS: Made from real cassava, these chips are not only delicious but also gluten-free. Cassava is a root vegetable known for its rich fiber content, which can promote digestive health and help you feel fuller for longer. This makes Iberia's Cassava Chips a smart choice for those looking for a snack that's both delicious and nutritious.
Bullet Point 4: LONG-LASTING FRESHNESS: Iberia Cassava Chips are stored in a jar, ensuring their freshness and taste are preserved. This convenient packaging allows you to enjoy their satisfying crunch whenever you please. Whether you're at home, work, or on a picnic, these cassava chips remain crispy and ready to provide a delightful snacking experience.
Bullet Point 5: FLAVOR ADVENTURE: Iberia Cassava Chips aren't just about health benefits; they're about an authentic flavor adventure. The chips retain the unique taste of cassava, providing an enjoyable snacking experience that stands out from the ordinary.
Value: 9.0
Unit: Ounce
product_name: Yuca Cassava Chips Saladita Lightly Salted
overall_summary: Mid-tier snack positioned as a healthier alternative to traditional potato chips, leveraging cassava as a gluten-free and low-fat ingredient. Glass jar packaging and natural claims suggest a focus on freshness and quality, though no premium branding or luxury indicators are visible. Value proposition relies on health-conscious marketing and unique cassava flavor, targeting health-oriented consumers rather than budget shoppers.

You will really enjoy the special Banana Macaroon aroma and taste! - Ingredients: Pu-erh tea, Banana Pieces, Coconut, Orange Peel and Natural Banana Macaroon Flavor. - Hot tea brewing method: Bring freshly drawn cold water to a rolling boil. Place 1 teabag for each desired cup into the teapot. Pour the boiling water into the pot, cover and let steep for 2-4 minutes. Pour into your cup; add milk and natural sweeteners to taste. - Iced tea brewing method: (to make 1 liter/quart): Place 5 teabags into a teapot or heat resistant pitcher. Pour 1 1/4 cups of freshly boiled water over the teabags. Steep for 5 minutes. Quarter fill a serving pitcher with cold water. Pour the tea into the serving pitcher. Add ice and top-up with cold water. Garnish and sweeten to taste. - TerraVita is an exclusive line of premium-quality, natural source products that use only the finest, purest and most potent ingredients found around the world. Our highest possible standards are certified by independent laboratories and backed by our personal guarantee. - TerraVita exists to meet and ensure your family's health and wellness without the harmful effects of chemicals and health products.
